title: Register page loads and shows registration form
description: Verifies that a new user can reach the registration page and see the required inputs and submit button.

title: Successful registration redirects to app
description: Verifies that submitting valid new user details creates the account and redirects to /app.

title: Registration blocked when required fields are empty
description: Verifies that the user cannot submit registration when required fields are missing and sees a visible validation message.

title: Request password reset with a registered email shows confirmation message
description: Verifies the forgot-password form accepts a valid email and shows a confirmation message to check email.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible

title: Request password reset with unknown email does not reveal account existence
description: Verifies the UI does not enumerate accounts when an unknown email is submitted.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible
Verify text "If an account exists" is visible

title: Forgot password requires an email value
description: Verifies submitting the forgot-password form with an empty email shows a visible validation message.

title: Forgot password rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies entering an invalid email format shows a visible validation error.

title: Reset password page shows fields when opened with a token-like URL
description: Verifies the reset-password page renders expected UI when accessed via a tokenized link.

steps.description: Verify element "New password" field is visible

title: Reset password requires new password value
description: Verifies submitting the reset-password form with an empty new password shows a visible validation message.

title: Reset password with an invalid or expired token shows an error message
description: Verifies the reset-password page displays a visible error when the token is invalid or expired.

steps.description: Type "NewPass!234" into the new password field

title: Generate roadmap with all preferences and confirm it appears on canvas and in sidebar
description: Verifies a user can generate an AI roadmap with full preference selections, see it rendered on the canvas, and see the new project saved in the sidebar.

steps.description: Type "Learn React from scratch to build a portfolio app" in the prompt input
Wait for the AI-generated roadmap to render on the canvas
Verify text "Learn React from scratch to build a portfolio app" is visible

title: Generate roadmap with minimal inputs (goal + generate) and verify canvas renders
description: Verifies a user can generate an AI roadmap by providing only a goal and clicking Generate, and the roadmap renders on the canvas.

steps.description: Type "Prepare for the AWS Solutions Architect Associate" in the prompt input
Wait for the AI-generated roadmap to render on the canvas
Verify text "Prepare for the AWS Solutions Architect Associate" is visible

title: Change preferences and generate to ensure selections are accepted before generation
description: Verifies that changing multiple preferences before generation still produces a roadmap render on the canvas.

steps.description: Type "Become job-ready in data analysis with Python" in the prompt input
Select "Intermediate" as the skill level preference
Select "Intensive" as the learning time preference
Select "Practice" as the learning style preference
Wait for the AI-generated roadmap to render on the canvas
Verify text "Become job-ready in data analysis with Python" is visible

title: Attempt generation with empty goal and verify a visible validation message
description: Verifies the app prevents generation when the goal input is empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Enter a learning goal" is visible

title: Attempt generation with whitespace-only goal and verify a visible validation message
description: Verifies the app treats whitespace-only input as invalid and shows a visible validation message instead of generating.

steps.description: Verify text "Enter a learning goal" is visible

title: Prevent duplicate submission by clicking Generate repeatedly and verify only one visible generation state
description: Verifies that repeated clicks on Generate do not produce multiple overlapping visible generation states and the UI shows a single in-progress state until completion.

steps.description: Type "Learn SQL for analytics" in the prompt input
Wait for the AI-generated roadmap to render on the canvas

title: Open roadmap canvas and verify core canvas UI renders
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can access /app and see the roadmap canvas with minimap and progress indicator visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Global progress indicator" is visible

title: Open node details by clicking a node
description: Verifies that clicking a roadmap node opens the node detail panel with visible content.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Verify element "Node detail panel" is visible

title: Close node detail panel and return focus to canvas
description: Verifies that the node detail panel can be dismissed and the canvas remains usable.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Verify element "Node detail panel" is visible
Click the "Close" button on the node detail panel
Verify element "Node detail panel" is not visible

title: Global progress indicator updates after completing a node
description: Verifies that completing a node causes the global progress indicator to change visually.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Verify element "Global progress indicator" is visible
Click the "Mark as complete" button in the node detail panel

title: Open node detail panel and view Resources for a selected node
description: Verifies a user can open the node detail panel from the canvas and view the Resources tab content for the selected topic.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas

title: Open a resource link from the Resources tab
description: Verifies a user can open a resource link from a node’s Resources tab without breaking the node panel experience.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the first visible resource link in the list

title: Create notes in Notes tab and verify they persist after tab switching
description: Verifies notes can be entered for a node and remain visible after switching away and back (auto-save behavior).

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Type "E2E note: auto-save check" into the notes editor
Verify text "E2E note: auto-save check" is visible

title: Switch between all tabs in the node detail panel
description: Verifies the user can switch between Resources, AI Tutor, Notes, and Quiz tabs and each tab renders a visible header/label.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas

title: Start a quiz from the Quiz tab for a selected node
description: Verifies the user can navigate to the Quiz tab and initiate a quiz using the Take Quiz button.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas

title: Mark a node as completed from the node detail panel
description: Verifies the user can mark the selected node as completed and sees a visible completion state confirmation.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas

title: Pass a timed quiz and receive XP
description: Verifies a user can start a node quiz, submit before time expires, see pass status, and receive XP.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel

title: Submit quiz before timer ends and view results
description: Verifies quiz questions can be answered and submitted before time runs out, and results are shown.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel

title: Results display includes score and pass/fail status
description: Verifies the results view shows a numeric score and an explicit pass/fail outcome after submission.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel

title: XP award is visible after passing a quiz
description: Verifies that passing a quiz results in visible XP gain feedback to the user.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel

title: Quiz timer expiration shows timeout message
description: Verifies the system shows a timeout message when the quiz timer expires before submission.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel
Wait for the timer to expire

title: Timer expiration shows partial results or retake prompt
description: Verifies that after a timeout the user sees either partial results or a prompt to retake the quiz.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel
Wait for the timer to expire

title: Retake quiz after timeout starts a new attempt
description: Verifies a user can retake the quiz after a timeout and is returned to the question view.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel
Wait for the timer to expire

title: Quiz UI remains usable when switching away and back to Quiz tab
description: Verifies the node detail panel Quiz tab can be reopened and still shows quiz entry controls.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel
Click on a different tab in the node detail panel
Click on the "Quiz" tab in the node detail panel

title: Node-scoped AI Tutor chat: send question and see AI response
description: Verifies a user can open AI Tutor for a node, send a question, and see an AI response in the chat thread.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Explain the key concepts of this topic in simple terms." into the chat message input field
Verify text "Explain the key concepts of this topic in simple terms." is visible
Verify an AI tutor response message is visible in the chat thread

title: AI Tutor chat history persists when reopening the same node
description: Verifies previously sent messages and AI responses remain visible after closing and reopening the AI Tutor for the same node.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Give me a short practice question for this topic." into the chat message input field
Verify text "Give me a short practice question for this topic." is visible
Verify an AI tutor response message is visible in the chat thread
Click the node detail panel close button
Click on the same node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Give me a short practice question for this topic." is visible

title: AI Tutor chat input validation: prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the chat does not send when the message input is empty and the UI indicates the message cannot be sent.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Message cannot be empty" is visible

title: AI Tutor maintains separate chat history between two different nodes
description: Verifies node-scoped separation: messages sent on one node are not shown when switching to a different node’s AI Tutor chat.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Define the most important terms for this node." into the chat message input field
Verify text "Define the most important terms for this node." is visible
Click the node detail panel close button
Click on a different node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Define the most important terms for this node." is not visible

title: AI Tutor chat thread supports scrolling to view earlier messages
description: Verifies that when the chat thread has multiple messages, the user can scroll and still see earlier sent messages.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "AI Tutor" tab in the node detail panel
Type "List 5 key takeaways." into the chat message input field
Type "Now expand on takeaway #1." into the chat message input field
Scroll to the top of the chat thread
Verify text "List 5 key takeaways." is visible

title: Auto-save notes for a selected node shows saved indicator
description: Verifies that typing notes in a node’s Notes tab auto-saves and shows a saved state.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "My first note for this node." into the notes editor

title: Notes persist after closing and reopening the same node detail panel
description: Verifies that previously saved notes are still visible when reopening the same node’s Notes tab.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Persistence check note." into the notes editor
Click on the same node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Persistence check note." is visible

title: Notes are unique per node (switching nodes shows different content)
description: Verifies that notes entered for one node do not appear when viewing a different node’s Notes tab.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Node A unique note." into the notes editor
Click on a different node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Node A unique note." is not visible

title: Saved indicator appears after an edit (not only on initial load)
description: Verifies that editing existing notes triggers auto-save and returns to a saved state.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Initial content." into the notes editor
Type " Added more." into the notes editor

title: Notes tab is accessible from node detail panel and shows an editor area
description: Verifies that the Notes tab can be opened and an editable notes area is visible for a selected node.

steps.description: Click on a node on the canvas
Click the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel

title: View profile overview (stats, achievements, and projects)
description: Verifies the profile page loads and shows learning stats, achievements/badges, and a project list with progress.

title: Profile stats show key metrics (XP, level, streak, learning time)
description: Verifies the profile page displays the main learning metrics in the stats area.

title: Project list shows projects with progress indicators
description: Verifies the project list section is visible and displays progress information for projects.

title: Edit profile: update name and bio and save successfully
description: Verifies a user can edit profile fields and sees a success confirmation after saving.

steps.description: Fill "Updated Test Name" into the name field
Fill "Updated bio for UI test" into the bio field

title: Edit profile: update additional fields (location and job role) and save
description: Verifies editing optional profile fields (location, job role) can be saved successfully.

steps.description: Fill "New York" into the location field
Fill "Software Engineer" into the job role field

title: Edit profile: cancel/close edit does not apply changes
description: Verifies closing the edit profile experience does not apply unsaved changes to the visible profile.

steps.description: Fill "This Should Not Persist" into the bio field
Verify text "This Should Not Persist" is not visible

title: Edit profile: validation error shows message and preserves draft values
description: Verifies a validation failure on save shows an error message and keeps the user-entered values in the edit form.

title: Create a new project from the app and open it in the canvas
description: Verifies a user can create a new project and see it appear in the sidebar and open in the canvas.

steps.description: Type "E2E Project Alpha" into the project name field
Verify text "E2E Project Alpha" is visible

title: Delete a project successfully after confirming deletion
description: Verifies a user can delete a project via the sidebar delete action and it is removed from the list.

steps.description: Type "Delete Me E2E" into the project name field
Verify text "Delete Me E2E" is visible
Click delete on the project "Delete Me E2E" in the sidebar
Click the "Confirm" button in the delete confirmation dialog
Verify text "Delete Me E2E" is not visible

title: Cancel deletion from the confirmation dialog keeps the project
description: Verifies a user can cancel a delete confirmation and the project is not removed.

steps.description: Type "Cancel Delete E2E" into the project name field
Verify text "Cancel Delete E2E" is visible
Click delete on the project "Cancel Delete E2E" in the sidebar
Click the "Cancel" button in the delete confirmation dialog
Verify text "Cancel Delete E2E" is visible

title: Attempt to create a project with an empty name shows validation and does not create
description: Verifies the UI prevents creating a project without a name and no new project appears.

title: Project list is visible on app load for an authenticated user
description: Verifies the projects sidebar list is present after logging in and loading the app.

steps.description: Verify element "Projects sidebar list" is visible
Verify element "New Project button" is visible

title: Make a roadmap public and open the shared link in read-only mode
description: Verifies a user can enable public visibility, copy the share link, and view the roadmap as a visitor in read-only mode.

steps.description: Open project settings for the current roadmap

title: Copy share link after enabling public visibility
description: Verifies the share link can be copied after making a roadmap public and the UI indicates a successful copy.

steps.description: Open project settings for the current roadmap

title: Shared roadmap is visibly read-only for visitors
description: Verifies the shared roadmap view indicates read-only mode and does not present editing controls.

steps.description: Open project settings for the current roadmap

title: Turning public visibility off removes public indicator in settings
description: Verifies a user can disable public visibility and the settings UI reflects the roadmap is no longer public.

steps.description: Open project settings for the current roadmap

title: Landing page loads and shows hero CTA
description: Verifies the public landing page loads successfully and the hero section with the primary CTA is visible.

title: Browse feature highlights section from the landing page
description: Verifies the user can scroll and see the feature highlights section content.

title: View comparison table section
description: Verifies the comparison section is reachable and visible on the landing page.

title: View pricing plans section
description: Verifies the pricing section is visible and presents plan information on the landing page.

title: Get Started CTA navigates to registration page
description: Verifies clicking the primary Get Started CTA routes the visitor to the registration page.

title: Get Started CTA works after scrolling to pricing
description: Verifies a Get Started CTA remains usable after the user browses lower sections and still routes to registration.
